description_long: This doll features a stylized, chibi-like design with a large head and small body proportions. The character has dark skin, large expressive eyes, and long, dark blue hair with turquoise highlights, styled into a high bun secured by a round, turquoise and white hair ornament. She wears a sporty outfit consisting of a white crop top with blue accents, blue shorts with gold trim, and white sandals with blue and gold details. Gold hoop earrings, a blue armband, and a white belt with a blue pouch add to her accessories. The doll is holding a small, round object resembling a Poké Ball in her right hand, and her facial expression is determined and focused.
description: A stylized doll with dark blue and turquoise hair, sporty clothing, and gold accessories, holding a Poké Ball-like object with a determined expression.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's expressive face, detailed outfit, and the Poké Ball-like object in her right hand.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the hair bun, turquoise hair ribbon, gold earring, and profile of the face.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large hair bun, turquoise hair strands, and back details of the outfit and sandals.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the doll's arm holding the Poké Ball-like object, gold earring, and side profile of the face and outfit.
attribute_clothing_style: Sporty, modern outfit with a white crop top featuring blue accents, blue shorts with gold trim, a white belt with a blue pouch, and white sandals with blue and gold details. The style is reminiscent of athletic or swimwear with bold, contrasting colors.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with the right arm bent forward holding a Poké Ball-like object, left arm relaxed at the side, legs slightly apart, and head facing forward with a slight tilt.
attribute_facial_expression: Determined and focused, with wide eyes, slightly furrowed brows, and a neutral mouth.
attribute_hair_style: Long, straight dark blue hair with turquoise highlights, styled into a high bun secured by a large, round turquoise and white ornament, with two long turquoise strands hanging down.
